qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_personal_liq as oi_personal_liq, SEC.policy, t0.oi_personal_liq as CODE, t0.oi_personal_liq as TEXT, t0.oi_personal_emp as oi_personal_emp FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Personal_Liquidacion.PERSONAL_LIQ\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_personal_liq LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_personal_liq asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-LIQ-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02.e_numero_legajo, PER01.d_ape_y_nom FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ AS LIQ25, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01 JOIN LIQ25.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.oi_personal INNER PER01.oi_personal
WHERE LIQ25.oi_personal_liq = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t0.oi_personal_liq as oi_personal_liq, SEC.policy FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as t0,NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Personal_Liquidacion.PERSONAL_LIQ\') as SEC JOIN t0.oi_personal_liq LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY oi_personal_liq asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-LIQ-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02.e_numero_legajo, PER01.d_ape_y_nom FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ AS LIQ25, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01 JOIN LIQ25.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.oi_personal INNER PER01.oi_personal
WHERE LIQ25.oi_personal_liq = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: FIND-LIQ-DESCR
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT PER02.e_numero_legajo, PER01.d_ape_y_nom FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ AS LIQ25, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01 JOIN LIQ25.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.oi_personal INNER PER01.oi_personal
WHERE LIQ25.oi_personal_liq = {#PARAM:@id} ')/ROWS/ROW

assosiation.description: Valores de los variables de Empleados Novedad
assosiation.label: Valores Variables Empleado de Novedad
assosiation.name: VAL_VAREN

assosiation.description: Valores de los variables de Empleados Novedad por Periodo
assosiation.label: Valores Variables Empleado Periodo de Novedad
assosiation.name: VAL_VARPN

form-properties.label: Valores Variables Empleado Periodo de Novedad

resource.declare: <DATOS oi_Liquidacion="59" todos="" excluir="" oi_tipo="1" oi_convenio="" oi_categoria=""><PERSONAS /></DATOS>
resource.name: QRY_Inicializar

qry:select.name: DatosLiq
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' select LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq, LIQ19.c_clase from liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19 WHERE liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion %} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: EGRESO
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa, PER02.oi_tipo_personal, PER02.oi_categoria_ult, per02.oi_obra_social, per02.oi_sindicato, per01.oi_afjp
from
PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01, ORG18_categorias as ORG18 JOIN PER02.oi_categoria_ult INNER ORG18.oi_categoria, PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion %} and per02.oi_indic_activo = 4 and (liq07.l_liq_final = 0 or isnull(liq07.l_liq_final) or liq19.l_ajuste = 1)
{%? (#FILTRO:@todos=1) {% and liq07.oi_personal_emp not in (select liq25.oi_personal_emp from liq25_personal_liq as liq25 where liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_Liquidacion %}) %}
{% {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_tipo!='') {% and PER02.oi_tipo_personal {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% != %} {% = %} %} {%= #FILTRO:@oi_tipo %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_categoria!='') {% and PER02.oi_categoria_ult {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% != %} {% = %} %} {%= #FILTRO:@oi_categoria %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_convenio!='') {% and PER02.oi_categoria_ult {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% not in %} {% in %} %} (Select c.oi_categoria from ORG18_CATEGORIAS as c where c.oi_convenio = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_convenio%}) %} {% %} %}
{%? (string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id)!='') {% and liq07.oi_personal_emp {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% not in %} {% in %} %} ({%=string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id) %}) and liq07.oi_personal_emp not in (select liq25.oi_personal_emp from liq25_personal_liq as liq25 where liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_Liquidacion %}) %} {% %} %} %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: HABERESMENSUAL
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa, PER02.oi_tipo_personal, PER02.oi_categoria_ult, per02.oi_obra_social, per02.oi_sindicato, per01.oi_afjp from
PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01, PER11_TIPOS_PERS as PP JOIN
PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER PP.oi_tipo_personal
WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion %} and liq19.c_clase = \'M\' and PP.c_tipo_personal in (\'1\',\'4\',\'8\',\'3\') and LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq = 1 and per02.oi_indic_activo = 1
{%? (#FILTRO:@todos=1) {% and liq07.oi_personal_emp not in (select liq25.oi_personal_emp from liq25_personal_liq as liq25 where liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_Liquidacion %}) %}
{% {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_tipo!='') {% and PER02.oi_tipo_personal {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% != %} {% = %} %} {%= #FILTRO:@oi_tipo %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_categoria!='') {% and PER02.oi_categoria_ult {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% != %} {% = %} %} {%= #FILTRO:@oi_categoria %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_convenio!='') {% and PER02.oi_categoria_ult {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% not in %} {% in %} %} (Select c.oi_categoria from ORG18_CATEGORIAS as c where c.oi_convenio = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_convenio%}) %} {% %} %}
{%? (string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id)!='') {% and liq07.oi_personal_emp {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% not in %} {% in %} %} ({%=string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id) %}) and liq07.oi_personal_emp not in (select liq25.oi_personal_emp from liq25_personal_liq as liq25 where liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_Liquidacion %}) %} {% %} %} %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: HABERESQUINCENAL
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' select PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP, PER02.E_NUMERO_LEGAJO, PER01.D_APE_Y_NOM, ORG03.c_empresa, ORG03.d_empresa , PER02.oi_tipo_personal, PER02.oi_categoria_ult, per02.oi_obra_social, per02.oi_sindicato, per01.oi_afjp from
PER02_PERSONAL_EMP AS PER02, org03_empresas AS ORG03, PER01_PERSONAL AS PER01, liq19_liquidacion AS LIQ19, liq07_personal AS LIQ07, LIQ01_TLIQ_TPER as L01, PER11_TIPOS_PERS as PP JOIN
PER02.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq19.oi_empresa INNER org03.oi_empresa, liq07.oi_personal_emp INNER per02.oi_personal_emp, PER02.OI_PERSONAL INNER PER01.OI_PERSONAL, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER per02.oi_tipo_personal, L01.oi_tipo_liq INNER LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq, L01.oi_tipo_personal INNER PP.oi_tipo_personal
WHERE PER02.OI_PERSONAL_EMP not in (SELECT liq25.oi_personal_emp FROM liq25_personal_liq AS LIQ25 WHERE liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion %}) AND liq19.OI_LIQUIDACION = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_liquidacion %} and liq19.c_clase = \'Q\' and PP.c_tipo_personal in (\'2\',\'5\') and LIQ19.oi_tipo_liq = 1 and per02.oi_indic_activo = 1
{%? (#FILTRO:@todos=1)
{% and liq07.oi_personal_emp not in (select liq25.oi_personal_emp from liq25_personal_liq as liq25 where liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_Liquidacion %}) %}
{% {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_tipo!='') {% and PER02.oi_tipo_personal {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% != %} {% = %} %} {%= #FILTRO:@oi_tipo %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_categoria!='') {% and PER02.oi_categoria_ult {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% != %} {% = %} %} {%= #FILTRO:@oi_categoria %} %} {% %} %} {%? (#FILTRO:@oi_convenio!='') {% and PER02.oi_categoria_ult {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% not in %} {% in %} %} (Select c.oi_categoria from ORG18_CATEGORIAS as c where c.oi_convenio = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_convenio%}) %} {% %} %}
{%? (string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id)!='') {% and liq07.oi_personal_emp {%? (#FILTRO:@excluir=1) {% not in %} {% in %} %} ({%=string(#FILTRO:PERSONAS/PERSONA/@id) %}) and liq07.oi_personal_emp not in (select liq25.oi_personal_emp from liq25_personal_liq as liq25 where liq25.oi_liquidacion = {%= #FILTRO:@oi_Liquidacion %}) %} {% %} %} %} %} order by E_NUMERO_LEGAJO ASC
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NOEGRESONIHAB

resource.description: Retorna todos las personas en una liquidación
resource.name: QRY_PersonalEnLiq

qry:select.name: qryDatosLiq
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT l.oi_liquidacion, l.c_liquidacion, l.d_titulo, l.c_estado
FROM LIQ19_LIQUIDACION as l
WHERE l.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: qryPersonasLiq
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT l.oi_personal_liq, p.oi_ctro_costo_ult, p.e_numero_legajo, o.c_centro_costo
FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as l, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as p, ORG08_CS_COSTO as o
JOIN l.oi_personal_emp INNER p.oi_personal_emp, p.oi_ctro_costo_ult INNER o.oi_centro_costo
WHERE l.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion}
')/ROWS/ROW

resource.description: Retorna la distribución de CCostos para las personas de una liquidación.
resource.name: QRY_DisCtroCostos

qry:select.name: qryDatos
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in sql(' SELECT d.oi_personal_emp, d.oi_centro_costo, o.c_centro_costo, p.e_numero_legajo
FROM LIQ07_DISTRIB_COS as d, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ as l, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP as p, ORG08_CS_COSTO as o
JOIN d.oi_personal_emp INNER l.oi_personal_emp, d.oi_personal_emp INNER p.oi_personal_emp, d.oi_centro_costo INNER o.oi_centro_costo
WHERE l.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Personal_Liquidacion.PERSONAL_LIQ.QUERY
NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Personal_Liquidacion.PERSONAL_LIQ.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq) as CNT from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL, LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ join LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Personal_Liquidacion.PERSONAL_LIQ.QUERY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' {%? (#SOURCE:@START='') {% %} {% fromrow {%=#SOURCE:@START %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@LEN='') {% %} {% maxsize {%=#SOURCE:@LEN %} %} %} select PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp as ID, PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo as COD, PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom as DES from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and ID={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(DES,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(COD,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp IN (select LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp from LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ where LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion={%=#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT %} ) %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@ORDERBY='') {% order by DES asc %} {% order by {%=#SOURCE:@ORDERBY %} asc %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: NucleusRH.Base.Liquidacion.Personal_Liquidacion.PERSONAL_LIQ.COUNT
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' select Count(LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp) as CNT from PER02_PERSONAL_EMP, PER01_PERSONAL join PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal INNER PER01_PERSONAL.oi_personal Where 1=1 {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_FIND='') {% %} {% and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@OI_FIND} %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND='') {% %} {% and (contain(PER01_PERSONAL.d_ape_y_nom,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND}) or contain(PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.e_numero_legajo,{#SOURCE:@TXT_FIND})) %} %} {%? (#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT='') {% %} {% and PER02_PERSONAL_EMP.oi_personal_emp={#SOURCE:@OI_PARENT} %} %}
{%? (#SOURCE:@WHERE='') {% %} {% and {%=#SOURCE:@WHERE %} %} %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, PER02_CARGOS JOIN LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp INNER PER02_CARGOS.oi_personal_emp WHERE PER02_CARGOS.oi_cargo = {#PARAM:@oi_cargo}
and LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_liq FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ, LIQ19_LIQUIDACION JOIN LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion INNER LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_liquidacion WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#PARAM:@oi_liquidacion} and LIQ19_LIQUIDACION.oi_empresa = {#PARAM:@oi_empresa} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: QRY_VAREN
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ25_VAREN_CARGO.oi_varen_cargo, LIQ25_VAREN_CARGO.oi_cargo, LIQ25_VAREN_CARGO.n_valor, LIQ25_VAREN_CARGO.oi_personal_liq FROM LIQ25_VAREN_CARGO WHERE LIQ25_VAREN_CARGO.oi_variable = {#PARAMIN:@oi_variable} and LIQ25_VAREN_CARGO.oi_personal_liq = {#PARAM:@oi_personal_liq} ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery:
for $r in SQL(' SELECT LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_personal_emp FROM LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ WHERE LIQ25_PERSONAL_LIQ.oi_liquidacion = {#SOURCE:@oi_liquidacion}
')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: split
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in split('100;{%=#ROWS2:ROW/@oi_personal_emp %}')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

class.help: Valores de los variables de Empleados Novedad
class.label: Valor Variable Empleado Novedad
class.name: VAL_VAREN

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

class.help: Valores de los variables de Empleados Novedad por Periodo
class.description: Valores Variables Empleado Periodo de Novedad
class.label: Valor Variable Empleado Novedad
class.name: VAL_VARPN

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

qry:select.name: sql1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in #PARAM:

cfg.title: Carga Masiva Manual de Datos por Cargo
